title: Plutarch, Moralia: Is Live Concealed a Wise Precept?
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Is Live Concealed a Wise Precept?.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Is Live Concealed a Wise Precept?.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Is Live Concealed a Wise Precept?': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
